name: Crunchy Lemon Syrup Cake
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
Preheat oven to 180°C/350°F.
Grease and line a 7-inch round cake tin.
Beat together the sugar and softened butter until fluffy.
Add the eggs one at a time, then add sifted flour and lemon rind.
Mix well to combine all ingredients.
Turn batter into cake tin and bake for 40-45 minutes,
until golden brown and risen, and an inserted skewer comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool in the tin.
TOPPING:
Sprinkle caster sugar over the hot cake.
Spoon lemon juice over the top of the cake.
Allow to cool completely before serving.
